   - Install Detox for mobile testing
   - Install Spectron for desktop testing

2. Create test data fixtures:
   - Create test tenant, users, integrations, rules
   - Seed database with test data
   - Create mock external services (Slack, Discord)

3. Implement E2E test scenarios:
   
   Scenario 1: Submit notification via Web Console
   - Login to web console
   - Navigate to notifications page
   - Submit new notification with channel = Slack
   - Verify notification appears in feed
   - Verify notification is delivered to Slack (mock)
   - Verify delivery status updates in real-time (WebSocket)
   
   Scenario 2: Configure integration and rule
   - Login to web console
   - Navigate to integrations page
   - Create new Slack integration
   - Navigate to rules page
   - Create rule: if severity = critical, route to Slack
   - Submit critical notification
   - Verify notification is routed to Slack integration
   
   Scenario 3: Receive push notification on mobile
   - Submit notification via API
   - Verify push notification is received on mobile device (mock FCM)
   - Tap notification to open app
   - Verify app navigates to notification detail screen
   
   Scenario 4: Desktop notification flow
   - Submit notification via API
   - Verify desktop notification is shown (native)
   - Verify system tray badge count updates
   - Click notification to open main window
   - Verify notification is highlighted
   
   Scenario 5: Batch notification submission
   - Submit batch of 100 notifications via API
   - Verify all notifications are processed
   - Verify delivery status for each notification
   - Check metrics endpoint for throughput
   
   Scenario 6: Failed delivery retry
   - Create integration with invalid webhook URL
   - Submit notification
   - Verify delivery fails
   - Verify retry attempts (3 times with exponential backoff)
   - Verify final status = failed
   - Verify dead letter queue contains notification

4. Implement performance tests:
   - Load test: 10,000 notifications/minute sustained for 5 minutes
   - Stress test: Increase load until failure
   - Spike test: Sudden burst of 50,000 notifications
   - Verify response times stay within SLA (< 100ms p95)

5. Implement security tests:
   - Test JWT authentication (invalid token, expired token)
   - Test RBAC (viewer cannot create notifications)
   - Test rate limiting (exceed limit, verify 429 response)
   - Test input validation (XSS, SQL injection attempts)

6. Create CI/CD pipeline for E2E tests:
   - Run E2E tests on every PR
   - Run performance tests nightly
   - Generate test report with coverage
   - Fail build if tests fail

7. Document test results:
   - Create test report with pass/fail status
   - Include screenshots/videos of test runs
   - Document known issues and workarounds

subtasks.description: Configure and initialize all E2E testing frameworks including Playwright for web, Detox for mobile, and Spectron for desktop testing with proper directory structure and dependencies.
subtasks.details: Create e2e-tests/ directory structure with subdirectories for web/, mobile/, and desktop/ tests. Install and configure Playwright with browser drivers for Chrome, Firefox, and Safari. Setup Detox for React Native with iOS and Android configurations. Install Spectron for Electron desktop app testing. Create base configuration files (playwright.config.ts, .detoxrc.js, spectron.config.js) with proper timeouts, retry logic, and test environment settings. Setup shared utilities directory for common test helpers and fixtures.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify all frameworks initialize correctly, configuration files are valid, and sample smoke tests can run for each platform
subtasks.title: Setup E2E Test Framework Infrastructure

subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive test data fixtures including tenants, users, integrations, rules, and mock external services with automated database seeding capabilities.
subtasks.details: Create fixtures/ directory with JSON/YAML files defining test tenants (multi-tenant scenarios), users with different roles (admin, editor, viewer), pre-configured integrations (Slack, Discord, webhooks), and notification rules with various conditions. Implement database seeding scripts using the application's ORM/database client to populate test databases. Create mock servers for external services (Slack API, Discord API, webhook endpoints) using tools like MSW or nock. Implement cleanup scripts to reset database state between test runs. Add fixture factory functions for dynamic test data generation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Validate fixtures load correctly, database seeding completes without errors, mock servers respond with expected payloads, and cleanup successfully resets state
subtasks.title: Create Test Data Fixtures and Database Seeding System

subtasks.description: Create comprehensive E2E tests for web console covering notification submission, integration configuration, rule creation, and real-time WebSocket updates.
subtasks.details: Implement Playwright test suite for web console with scenarios: (1) User authentication and session management, (2) Submit notification via UI with validation of form fields and real-time feed updates, (3) Configure Slack/Discord integrations with credential validation, (4) Create notification routing rules with condition builder UI, (5) Verify WebSocket real-time delivery status updates, (6) Test notification filtering and search functionality, (7) Verify integration health status indicators. Include page object models for maintainability. Add visual regression testing for critical UI components. Implement wait strategies for asynchronous operations and WebSocket connections.
subtasks.testStrategy: Each scenario should run independently with isolated test data. Verify UI state changes, API calls, and WebSocket messages. Capture screenshots on failure for debugging.
subtasks.title: Implement Web Console E2E Test Scenarios

subtasks.description: Create Detox-based E2E tests for mobile app covering push notifications, deep linking, navigation flows, and notification detail screens.
subtasks.details: Implement Detox test suite for React Native mobile app with scenarios: (1) Mock FCM/APNs push notification delivery and reception, (2) Tap notification to open app and verify deep linking to detail screen, (3) Navigate notification feed with pull-to-refresh and infinite scroll, (4) Test notification actions (mark as read, archive, delete), (5) Verify offline mode with local caching, (6) Test biometric authentication flow, (7) Verify badge count updates on app icon. Create mock push notification server to simulate FCM/APNs. Implement device-specific tests for iOS and Android differences. Add accessibility testing for screen readers.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run tests on both iOS simulator and Android emulator. Verify push notification handling, navigation stack, and local storage state. Test network conditions (offline, slow 3G).
subtasks.title: Implement Mobile App E2E Test Scenarios

subtasks.description: Create Spectron-based E2E tests for Electron desktop app covering native notifications, system tray integration, window management, and cross-platform behaviors.
subtasks.details: Implement Spectron test suite for Electron desktop app with scenarios: (1) Native system notification display and interaction, (2) System tray icon badge count updates, (3) Click notification to focus main window and highlight notification, (4) Test window state management (minimize to tray, restore, multi-window), (5) Verify auto-updater flow with mock update server, (6) Test keyboard shortcuts and menu items, (7) Cross-platform behavior verification (Windows, macOS, Linux). Mock native OS APIs for notification center. Implement tests for IPC communication between main and renderer processes. Add tests for app lifecycle events (startup, shutdown, crash recovery).
subtasks.testStrategy: Run tests on Windows, macOS, and Linux VMs. Verify native OS integration, IPC messages, and window state persistence. Test graceful degradation when native features unavailable.
subtasks.title: Implement Desktop App E2E Test Scenarios

subtasks.description: Create comprehensive integration tests covering batch processing, retry mechanisms, dead letter queues, and performance testing including load, stress, and spike tests.
subtasks.details: Implement integration test scenarios: (1) Batch submission of 100 notifications with verification of processing order and delivery status, (2) Failed delivery retry flow with exponential backoff verification (3 attempts), (3) Dead letter queue population for permanently failed notifications, (4) Multi-tenant isolation verification. Implement performance test suite using k6 or Artillery: (1) Load test: 10,000 notifications/minute sustained for 5 minutes with p95 latency < 100ms, (2) Stress test: Gradually increase load until system degradation, (3) Spike test: Sudden burst of 50,000 notifications with recovery verification, (4) Endurance test: 24-hour sustained moderate load. Monitor system metrics (CPU, memory, database connections) during tests. Verify metrics API endpoint accuracy.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run performance tests in isolated environment with production-like infrastructure. Collect detailed metrics and generate performance reports. Verify SLA compliance and system stability under load.
subtasks.title: Implement Cross-Service Integration and Performance Test Scenarios

subtasks.description: Create comprehensive security tests covering authentication, authorization, rate limiting, input validation, and common vulnerability patterns.
subtasks.details: Implement security test scenarios: (1) JWT authentication tests with invalid tokens, expired tokens, tampered signatures, and missing tokens, (2) RBAC authorization tests verifying viewer cannot create/delete, editor cannot manage integrations, admin has full access, (3) Rate limiting tests exceeding configured limits with verification of 429 responses and proper headers, (4) Input validation tests for XSS attempts in notification content, SQL injection in search queries, path traversal in file uploads, (5) CORS policy verification, (6) CSRF protection validation, (7) Sensitive data exposure checks in logs and error messages, (8) API versioning and deprecation handling. Use OWASP ZAP or similar tools for automated vulnerability scanning. Test encryption of data in transit and at rest.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run security tests in isolated environment. Verify proper error handling without information leakage. Generate security test report with CVSS scores for any findings.
subtasks.title: Implement Security and Compliance Test Suite

subtasks.description: Integrate all E2E tests into CI/CD pipeline with automated execution, reporting, and documentation generation including test results, coverage, screenshots, and videos.
subtasks.details: Configure CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Jenkins) to: (1) Run web E2E tests on every PR with parallel execution across browsers, (2) Run mobile tests on PR with iOS/Android simulators, (3) Run desktop tests on PR with multi-platform runners, (4) Run integration and security tests on PR, (5) Run performance tests nightly with trend analysis, (6) Generate unified test report with pass/fail status, execution time, and coverage metrics using Allure or similar, (7) Capture screenshots and videos for failed tests, (8) Archive test artifacts and reports, (9) Send notifications on test failures. Create comprehensive documentation: test architecture overview, how to run tests locally, how to add new tests, troubleshooting guide, known issues and workarounds, test data management guide. Implement test result dashboards with historical trends. Configure build to fail on test failures with appropriate exit codes.
